Class CircuitCubesProtocolConstants

java.lang.Object
ch.varani.bricks.ble.device.circuitcubes.CircuitCubesProtocolConstants
public final class CircuitCubesProtocolConstants extends Object
Constants for the Circuit Cubes (Tenka) BLE motor control protocol.

Reference: Circuit Cubes Python Interface

All commands are ASCII strings written to the TX characteristic. Responses (e.g. battery voltage) arrive as UTF-8 strings on the RX characteristic.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final byte
    BATTERY_QUERY_COMMAND
    ASCII byte to write to TX in order to request the battery voltage.
    static final char
    CHANNEL_A
    Channel A motor letter (ASCII 'a').
    static final char
    CHANNEL_B
    Channel B motor letter (ASCII 'b').
    static final char
    CHANNEL_C
    Channel C motor letter (ASCII 'c').
    static final String
    DEVICE_NAME
    Advertised BLE device name for Circuit Cubes.
    static final int
    MAGNITUDE_MAX
    Maximum magnitude value (full speed).
    static final int
    MAGNITUDE_MIN_NONZERO
    Minimum non-zero magnitude value.
    static final int
    MAGNITUDE_STOP
    Magnitude value that represents a stopped motor.
    static final int
    MAX_INTERNAL_VELOCITY
    Maximum internal velocity (absolute value), used when encoding magnitudes.
    static final String
    NUS_SERVICE_UUID
    UUID of the Nordic UART Service (NUS) used by Circuit Cubes.
    static final String
    RX_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID
    UUID of the RX characteristic (notify).
    static final char
    SIGN_FORWARD
    Sign character for forward / positive direction.
    static final char
    SIGN_REVERSE
    Sign character for reverse / negative direction.
    static final String
    TX_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID
    UUID of the TX characteristic (write-without-response).

    • DEVICE_NAME

      public static final String DEVICE_NAME
      Advertised BLE device name for Circuit Cubes.

    • NUS_SERVICE_UUID

      public static final String NUS_SERVICE_UUID
      UUID of the Nordic UART Service (NUS) used by Circuit Cubes.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • TX_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID

      public static final String TX_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID
      UUID of the TX characteristic (write-without-response). Commands are written here to control motors.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • RX_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID

      public static final String RX_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID
      UUID of the RX characteristic (notify). Battery voltage responses arrive here.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CHANNEL_A

      public static final char CHANNEL_A
      Channel A motor letter (ASCII 'a').
      See Also:

      public static final char CHANNEL_B
      Channel B motor letter (ASCII 'b').

      public static final char CHANNEL_C
      Channel C motor letter (ASCII 'c').

      public static final char SIGN_FORWARD
      Sign character for forward / positive direction.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • SIGN_REVERSE

      public static final char SIGN_REVERSE
      Sign character for reverse / negative direction.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MAGNITUDE_STOP

      public static final int MAGNITUDE_STOP
      Magnitude value that represents a stopped motor.

      Command wire format: "000".

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MAGNITUDE_MIN_NONZERO

      public static final int MAGNITUDE_MIN_NONZERO
      Minimum non-zero magnitude value.

      For a non-zero internal velocity v (range 1–200): magnitude = MAGNITUDE_MIN_NONZERO + abs(v).

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MAGNITUDE_MAX

      public static final int MAGNITUDE_MAX
      Maximum magnitude value (full speed).

      Internal velocity range is −200 to +200; maximum magnitude = 55 + 200 = 255.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MAX_INTERNAL_VELOCITY

      public static final int MAX_INTERNAL_VELOCITY
      Maximum internal velocity (absolute value), used when encoding magnitudes.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • BATTERY_QUERY_COMMAND

      public static final byte BATTERY_QUERY_COMMAND
      ASCII byte to write to TX in order to request the battery voltage. The response is a UTF-8 string on the RX characteristic.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
